Tests for relational operators in JavaScript.

# Purpose
This code is a set of assertions that test the behavior of comparison operators in JavaScript. It checks the correctness of relational operations such as less than (`<`), greater than (`>`), less than or equal to (`<=`), and greater than or equal to (`>=`) with both numeric and string values. The assertions verify expected outcomes for comparisons between numbers, including special cases involving `Infinity`, and between strings, including empty strings and strings of different lengths. This script serves as a simple test suite to ensure that the JavaScript engine correctly implements these comparison operations.
